notes.note: Invalid sessions are correctly blocked from protected routes and user is redirected to /login. Minor observation: stale tokens may persist in localStorage after redirect, but routing behavior is correct and protected shell is not usable.

Company switcher dropdown showed 'No companies found' for test users, but the backend token rotation mechanism (POST /api/v1/auth/refresh-token with companyCode) works correctly per contract. Manual API testing confirmed token rotation and tenant context binding.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: web' section with isolation rules, boundaries, evidence capture guidance, concurrency constraints, and tool usage instructions for browser-based flow validators.
